ast.source: Select a Jupyter notebook to convert:
ast.target: 选择要转换的 Jupyter 笔记本：

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 需要 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制将帧率设置为高于 125 fps

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the Python interpreter. Requires restart to take effect.
ast.target: 选择 Python 解释器。需要重启后生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the command to launch Jupyter notebooks in your preferred editor (e.g., 'code' for VS Code, 'jupyter-lab' for Jupyter Lab, 'pycharm64.exe' for PyCharm, etc.)
ast.target: 指定在首选编辑器中打开 Jupyter 笔记本的命令（例如：VS Code 用 'code'，Jupyter Lab 用 'jupyter-lab'，PyCharm 用 'pycharm64.exe' 等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, the default Obsidian code block will be used. Requires restart to take effect.
ast.target: 禁用时将使用默认的 Obsidian 代码块。需要重启后生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, linked markdown and Jupyter notebook files will have to be synced manually through the "JupyMD: Sync files" command. Disable if experiencing sync issues.
ast.target: 禁用时，关联的 markdown 和 Jupyter 笔记本文件需要通过“JupyMD: Sync files”命令手动同步。如遇同步问题请禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, changes made in a Jupyter notebook file will always be overwritten by changes made in its paired markdown file. Enabling may cause sync issues.
ast.target: 禁用时，Jupyter 笔记本文件中的更改将始终被其配对的 markdown 文件中的更改覆盖。启用可能导致同步问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Prism.fileHighlight 已弃用。请改用 `Prism.plugins.fileHighlight.highlight`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Max sync wait time exceeded, proceeding with execution
ast.target: 超过最大同步等待时间，继续执行

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Code execution proceeding despite sync being blocked (timeout reached)
ast.target: 同步被阻止（已超时），仍继续执行代码

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warnings issued for installation, check console for details.
ast.target: 安装已发出警告，请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to install packages, check console for details.
ast.target: 安装包失败，请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Please restart the kernel before executing code in another note.
Use the 'Restart Python kernel' command.
ast.target:
请在其他笔记中执行代码前重启内核。
使用“重启 Python 内核”命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error updating notebook, check console for details
ast.target: 更新笔记本出错，请查看控制台了解详情

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Python process error, check console for details
ast.target: Python 进程出错，请查看控制台了解详情
